target_meaning: each and every move; every single action

source_meaning: adult children who live off their parents' income without finding work
target_meaning: child who squanders the family fortune

source_meaning: a better place (said when expressing condolences for a death)
target_meaning: may you have a safe journey; bon voyage

source_meaning: a credulous or gullible person; a person who is swayed easily by what others say
target_meaning: to take something (usually a fraudulent claim) as a matter of fact without further inspection; to be too credulous

source_meaning: be at a loss what to do
target_meaning: to not know how to deal with a complicated problem or affair

source_meaning: to fall asleep, go to sleep, nod off
to be endless; to be limitless; to be uncountable
target_meaning: endless; talking nineteen to the dozen
